notes: Bug is in AngleSwapChainPanel.RenderFrame() (UWP/WinUI ANGLE view layer) where an empty SwapBuffers failure recovery block allows the render thread to silently stop after prolonged use. Reproduction requires a Windows host with UWP SDK and 8+ hours of continuous rendering with DrawInBackground=true. Console fallback is not viable — the bug is in platform-specific EGL/ANGLE swap chain infrastructure, not core SkiaSharp. Docker cannot run Windows GUI/UWP apps.
blockers: Requires Windows host — bug is in UWP/WinUI AngleSwapChainPanel view layer with ANGLE/EGL rendering, not reproducible via console or Docker on macOS
Reproduction requires 8+ hours of continuous background rendering to trigger the device-lost event that exposes the empty SwapBuffers recovery block
Docker cannot run Windows GUI/UWP applications

reproductionSteps.description: Check host environment — macOS arm64, no Windows available
Verify Docker available but cannot run Windows GUI/UWP apps
Verify AngleSwapChainPanel.cs exists with empty SwapBuffers recovery block confirming the reported code path
Verify RenderLoop has no try-catch around RenderFrame — background thread exception kills it silently

corrections.corrected: Confirmed: Windows is required. macOS host cannot reproduce UWP ANGLE rendering bugs via any fallback (console, Docker).
